final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input set,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge set) begin
        if (set)
            q <= 4'b1111;  // Set register
        else
            q <= d;  // Load data
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= 4'b0000;
    end
  end

endmodule
